_comment: Species: Berserk Beast (狂兽) from Pursuit of the Truth. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Berserk Beast

canonical.appearance: Shifting bestial form 4 m tall, body perpetually wreathed in savage qi, eyes crimson
canonical.size: 4 m adult, 3000 jin; ancient 15 m, 100000 jin
canonical.behavior: Born of accumulated savage qi; hunts by berserk charge; cultivates by killing
canonical.habitat: Southern Region savage lands, berserk-aspected forbidden zones
canonical.diet: savage qi, weaker beasts, lost cultivators
canonical.relationships: Enemy of Su Ming's lineage; born of the same savage qi
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: berserk_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
